newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: Piggles ULTRAPRO
newsitems.contents:
[p]All changes from the animgraph_2_beta build are now live.[/p][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted general weapon deploy animation logic.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed issues with transitioning between knife attacks.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed Elites not shooting in third-person.[/p][/*][/list][p]
\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a bug that allowed silently climbing ladders at run speed by sporadically tapping movement keys.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted ground smoothing at locations where sloped ground surfaces transition to flat ground.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed held grenades inheriting incorrect scale in some circumstances such as after being dropped and picked up.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a crash at halftime when transitioning from CT to T.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en:
[p]All changes from the animgraph_2_beta build are now live.[/p][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted general weapon deploy animation logic.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed issues with transitioning between knife attacks.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed Elites not shooting in third-person.[/p][/*][/list][p]
\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a bug that allowed silently climbing ladders at run speed by sporadically tapping movement keys.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted ground smoothing at locations where sloped ground surfaces transition to flat ground.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed held grenades inheriting incorrect scale in some circumstances such as after being dropped and picked up.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a crash at halftime when transitioning from CT to T.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn:
[p]animgraph_2_beta 版本中的所有更改现已生效。[/p][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]对视图模型动画进行了细微调整。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了一般武器部署动画逻辑。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了刀之间转换的问题攻击。[/p][/*][*][p]修复精英不以第三人称射击的问题。[/p][/*][/list][p]
\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]修复了一个错误，该错误允许通过偶尔点击移动键以运行速度悄悄攀登梯子。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了倾斜地面过渡到平坦地面的位置的地面平滑度。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了持有的手榴弹在某些情况下继承不正确的比例，例如在掉落和拾取后up.[/p][/*][*][p]修复了从CT转换到T时中场休息时的崩溃问题。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]The following changes are available in the animgraph_2_beta build. To opt into the beta build, follow the instructions here: [url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A"]https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A[/url][/p][p][/p][p]To report bugs or provide feedback about the beta build, please email csgoteamfeedback@[url="https://valvesoftware.com"]valvesoftware.com[/url] with the subject "AG2 Beta".[/p][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed viewmodel and worldmodel HE grenade throw[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted foot IK when idle[/p][/*][*][p]Minor polish for turn animations when planting[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed fast-weapon switching when holding inspect[/p][/*][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted counter-strafe animation head dip amount[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]Please note that the client may produce a fatal error message when attempting to connect to a server running a different build.[/p]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]The following changes are available in the animgraph_2_beta build. To opt into the beta build, follow the instructions here: [url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A"]https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A[/url][/p][p][/p][p]To report bugs or provide feedback about the beta build, please email csgoteamfeedback@[url="https://valvesoftware.com"]valvesoftware.com[/url] with the subject "AG2 Beta".[/p][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed viewmodel and worldmodel HE grenade throw[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted foot IK when idle[/p][/*][*][p]Minor polish for turn animations when planting[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed fast-weapon switching when holding inspect[/p][/*][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted counter-strafe animation head dip amount[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]Please note that the client may produce a fatal error message when attempting to connect to a server running a different build.[/p]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]animgraph_2_beta 版本中提供了以下更改。要选择加入测试版，请按照此处的说明进行操作：[url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A"]https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A[/url][/p][p][/p][p]报告错误或提供有关测试版的反馈构建，请发送电子邮件至 csgoteamfeedback@[url="https://valvesoftware.com"]valvesoftware.com[/url]，主题为“AG2 Beta”。[/p][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]修复了视图模型和世界模型 HE 手榴弹投掷[/p][/*][*][p]调整脚部 IK空闲[/p][/*][*][p]种植时转弯动画的小幅改进[/p][/*][*][p]修复了按住检查时的快速武器切换[/p][/*][*][p]对视图模型动画的小调整[/p][/*][*][p]调整了反平移动画头部倾斜amount[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]请注意，当客户端尝试连接到运行不同版本的服务器时，可能会产生致命错误消息。[/p]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]The following changes are available in the animgraph_2_beta build. To opt into the beta build, follow the instructions here: [url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A"]https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A[/url][/p][p][/p][p]To report bugs or provide feedback about the beta build, please email csgoteamfeedback@[url="https://valvesoftware.com"]valvesoftware.com[/url] with the subject "AG2 Beta".[/p][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed wrong pose when backing into corners[/p][/*][*][p]Improved stuttering of 3rd person aim[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed main menu pistol poses[/p][/*][*][p]Added missing knife draw animations[/p][/*][*][p]Fix pop when running and switching weapons[/p][/*][*][p]Fix pop when switching weapons after throwing a grenade[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed head wobbling when planting C4[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed issue when holding inspect and changing weapons[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ OTHER ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case where it was possible to climb down ladders faster than before.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]Please note that the client may produce a fatal error message when attempting to connect to a server running a different build.[/p]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]The following changes are available in the animgraph_2_beta build. To opt into the beta build, follow the instructions here: [url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A"]https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A[/url][/p][p][/p][p]To report bugs or provide feedback about the beta build, please email csgoteamfeedback@[url="https://valvesoftware.com"]valvesoftware.com[/url] with the subject "AG2 Beta".[/p][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed wrong pose when backing into corners[/p][/*][*][p]Improved stuttering of 3rd person aim[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed main menu pistol poses[/p][/*][*][p]Added missing knife draw animations[/p][/*][*][p]Fix pop when running and switching weapons[/p][/*][*][p]Fix pop when switching weapons after throwing a grenade[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed head wobbling when planting C4[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed issue when holding inspect and changing weapons[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ OTHER ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case where it was possible to climb down ladders faster than before.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]Please note that the client may produce a fatal error message when attempting to connect to a server running a different build.[/p]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]animgraph_2_beta 版本中提供了以下更改。要选择加入测试版，请按照此处的说明进行操作：[url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A"]https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A[/url][/p][p][/p][p]报告错误或提供有关测试版的反馈构建，请发送电子邮件至 csgoteamfeedback@[url="https://valvesoftware.com"]valvesoftware.com[/url]，主题为“AG2 Beta”。[/p][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]修复了倒车时的错误姿势[/p][/*][*][p]改进了第三个的口吃人物目标[/p][/*][*][p]修复了主菜单手枪姿势[/p][/*][*][p]添加了缺少的刀画动画[/p][/*][*][p]修复了跑步和切换武器时的爆音[/p][/*][*][p]修复了投掷手榴弹后切换武器时的爆音[/p][/*][*][p]修复了当种植C4[/p][/*][*][p]修复了检查和更换武器时的问题[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ OTHER ][/p][list][*][p]修复了可以比以前更快地爬下梯子的情况。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]请注意，客户端在尝试连接时可能会产生致命错误消息到运行不同版本的服务器。[/p]

newsitems.contents_cn: [p]animgraph_2_beta 版本中提供了以下更改。要选择进入测试版本，请按照此处的说明进行操作：[/p][p][url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A"]https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A[/url][/p][p][/p][p]报告错误或提供有关测试版本的反馈，请发送电子邮件至 csgoteamfeedback@valvesoftware.com，主题为“AG2 Beta”。[/p][p][/p][p] \[ NETWORK][/p][list][*][p]网络带宽利用率降低[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]请注意，当客户端尝试连接到运行不同版本的服务器时，可能会产生致命错误消息构建。[/p]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 gets a Beta with a fancy new animation system
newsitems.contents:
While I still sit here waiting for Danger Zone to return (please Valve), Counter-Strike 2 just got a big Beta upgrade with a new animation system.

Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/04/counter-strike-2-gets-a-beta-with-a-fancy-new-animation-system/
newsitems.title_en: Counter-Strike 2 gets a Beta with a fancy new animation system
newsitems.contents_en:
While I still sit here waiting for Danger Zone to return (please Valve), Counter-Strike 2 just got a big Beta upgrade with a new animation system.

Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/04/counter-strike-2-gets-a-beta-with-a-fancy-new-animation-system/
newsitems.title_cn: Counter-Strike 2 发布 Beta 版，配备精美的新动画系统
newsitems.contents_cn:
当我还坐在这里等待《危险地带》回归时（请 Valve），《反恐精英 2》刚刚进行了重大测试版升级，配备了新的动画系统。

在此处阅读全文： https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/04/counter-strike-2-gets-a-beta-with-a-fancy-new-animation-system/

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: Piggles ULTRAPRO
newsitems.contents: [p]The following changes are available in the animgraph_2_beta build. To opt into the beta build, follow the instructions here: [url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A"]https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A[/url][/p][p][/p][p]To report bugs or provide feedback about the beta build, please email csgoteamfeedback@[url="https://valvesoftware.com"]valvesoftware.com[/url] with the subject "AG2 Beta".[/p][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][p]The CS2 animation system has been updated to Animgraph 2, which reduces CPU and networking costs associated with animation.[/p][list][*][p]All third-person animations have been re-authored, and in several cases adjusted in response to player feedback.[/p][/*][*][p]Smoothed in-air crouching transitions in first and third-person.[/p][/*][*][p]In support of Animgraph 2, the logic adjusting player height on sloped surfaces has been refactored.[/p][list][*][p]Player height on ramps is now consistent and no longer depends on approach direction.[/p][/*][*][p]As a result of this change, grenade lineups on sloped surfaces may have changed.[/p][/*][/list][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ENGINE ][/p][list][*][p]Updated engine code to the latest version of Source 2.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ CS SCRIPT ][/p][list][*][p]Added function GetRoundRemainingTime.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ GAMEPLAY ] [/p][list][*][p]Player occlusion now uses a GPU query to prevent players clipping through thin walls when none of their bounding volume is visible.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ SOUND ][/p][list][*][p]Mix adjustments to help accentuate jump landing sounds during combat.[/p][/*][*][p]New c4 equip sound.[/p][/*][*][p]Minor adjustments to ambient sound levels.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed missing ambient sounds on team selection and end of match screens.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed missing sounds in the main menu UI[/p][/*][*][p]Mix tweaks while taking damage[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed bug where DeathCam music cue was causing volume ducking for too long. [/p][/*][*][p]Vertical occlusion is now more gradual at the edges of transition points in Nuke and Vertigo.[/p][/*][*][p]Various map audio adjustments in Baggage, Shoots, Ancient, Nuke, and Vertigo.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ KNOWN ISSUES ][/p][list][*][p][strike]In some rare cases, when you turn your head there will be a slight unintended camera shift.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]The Karambit crouch animation has a strange wrist rotation.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]Certain combinations of graphics settings result in many things rendering as solid black.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]Some materials are missing their normal tint.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]The Default T shirt is missing its pattern.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]Overpass has broken shadows at Fountain, Playground and Long.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]Rapid hand switching just shows up as a blinking weapon.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]The third-person Shadow Daggers deploy animation is misbehaving.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]Third-person idle animations stop during first-person weapon inspects.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]The Paracord Knife is missing a deploy animation.[/strike][/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]The following changes are available in the animgraph_2_beta build. To opt into the beta build, follow the instructions here: [url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A"]https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A[/url][/p][p][/p][p]To report bugs or provide feedback about the beta build, please email csgoteamfeedback@[url="https://valvesoftware.com"]valvesoftware.com[/url] with the subject "AG2 Beta".[/p][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][p]The CS2 animation system has been updated to Animgraph 2, which reduces CPU and networking costs associated with animation.[/p][list][*][p]All third-person animations have been re-authored, and in several cases adjusted in response to player feedback.[/p][/*][*][p]Smoothed in-air crouching transitions in first and third-person.[/p][/*][*][p]In support of Animgraph 2, the logic adjusting player height on sloped surfaces has been refactored.[/p][list][*][p]Player height on ramps is now consistent and no longer depends on approach direction.[/p][/*][*][p]As a result of this change, grenade lineups on sloped surfaces may have changed.[/p][/*][/list][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ENGINE ][/p][list][*][p]Updated engine code to the latest version of Source 2.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ CS SCRIPT ][/p][list][*][p]Added function GetRoundRemainingTime.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ GAMEPLAY ] [/p][list][*][p]Player occlusion now uses a GPU query to prevent players clipping through thin walls when none of their bounding volume is visible.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ SOUND ][/p][list][*][p]Mix adjustments to help accentuate jump landing sounds during combat.[/p][/*][*][p]New c4 equip sound.[/p][/*][*][p]Minor adjustments to ambient sound levels.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed missing ambient sounds on team selection and end of match screens.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed missing sounds in the main menu UI[/p][/*][*][p]Mix tweaks while taking damage[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed bug where DeathCam music cue was causing volume ducking for too long. [/p][/*][*][p]Vertical occlusion is now more gradual at the edges of transition points in Nuke and Vertigo.[/p][/*][*][p]Various map audio adjustments in Baggage, Shoots, Ancient, Nuke, and Vertigo.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ KNOWN ISSUES ][/p][list][*][p][strike]In some rare cases, when you turn your head there will be a slight unintended camera shift.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]The Karambit crouch animation has a strange wrist rotation.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]Certain combinations of graphics settings result in many things rendering as solid black.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]Some materials are missing their normal tint.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]The Default T shirt is missing its pattern.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]Overpass has broken shadows at Fountain, Playground and Long.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]Rapid hand switching just shows up as a blinking weapon.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]The third-person Shadow Daggers deploy animation is misbehaving.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]Third-person idle animations stop during first-person weapon inspects.[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]The Paracord Knife is missing a deploy animation.[/strike][/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]animgraph_2_beta 版本中提供了以下更改。要选择加入测试版，请按照此处的说明进行操作：[url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A"]https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A[/url][/p][p][/p][p]报告错误或提供有关测试版的反馈构建，请发送电子邮件至 csgoteamfeedback@[url="https://valvesoftware.com"]valvesoftware.com[/url]，主题为“AG2 Beta”。[/p][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][p]CS2 动画系统已更新为 Animgraph 2，这降低了与动画相关的 CPU 和网络成本。[/p][list][*][p]所有第三人称动画已被重新创作，并在某些情况下根据玩家反馈进行了调整。[/p][/*][*][p]第一人称和第三人称中的空中蹲伏过渡变得平滑。[/p][/*][*][p]为了支持 Animgraph 2，调整倾斜表面上的玩家高度的逻辑已被重构。[/p][list][*][p]斜坡上的玩家高度现在是一致的，不再依赖于[/p][/*][*][p]由于此更改，倾斜表面上的手榴弹排列可能会发生变化。[/p][/*][/list][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ENGINE ][/p][list][*][p]将引擎代码更新为最新版本的源代码2.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ CS SCRIPT ][/p][list][*][p]添加了函数 GetRoundRemainingTime。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ GAMEPLAY ] [/p][list][*][p]玩家遮挡现在使用 GPU 查询来防止玩家穿过薄层当没有任何边界体积可见时，墙壁。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[声音 ][/p][list][*][p]混合调整以帮助强调战斗期间的跳跃着陆声音。[/p][/*][*][p]新的 c4 装备声音。[/p][/*][*][p]对环境声音的细微调整[/p][/*][*][p]修复了团队选择和比赛结束屏幕上丢失的环境声音。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了主菜单 UI 中丢失的声音[/p][/*][*][p]受到伤害时进行混合调整[/p][/*][*][p]修复了 DeathCam 音乐提示导致音量闪避时间过长的错误。 [/p][/*][*][p]Nuke 和 Vertigo 中过渡点边缘的垂直遮挡现在更加渐进。[/p][/*][*][p]Baggage、Shoots、Ancient、Nuke 和 Vertigo 中的各种地图音频调整。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ 已知问题][/p][list][*][p][strike]在极少数情况下，当您转动头部时，镜头会出现轻微的意外偏移。[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]Karambit 蹲伏动画有一个奇怪的手腕旋转。[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]图形设置的某些组合会导致许多东西渲染为实体黑色。[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]某些材质缺少正常色调。[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]默认 T 恤缺少图案。[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]立交桥在喷泉、游乐场和长。[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]快速的手部切换仅显示为闪烁的武器。[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]第三人称暗影匕首部署动画行为异常。[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]第三人称闲置动画在第一人称武器期间停止检查。[/strike][/p][/*][*][p][strike]伞绳刀缺少部署动画。[/strike][/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Animgraph 2 Beta
newsitems.author: Piggles ULTRAPRO
newsitems.contents:
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/3b774ae067b0a4fb8b71d41fdde8d073ac5a064c.png[/img]

Today we're shipping a beta build that updates CS2's animation system to Animgraph 2, which reduces the CPU and networking costs associated with animation. Along with the technical work involved in switching to the new system, all third person animations have been re-authored and, in many cases, adjusted in response to player feedback.

It's time for you to take a look, poke around for bugs, and tell us what you think. To opt into the beta build, follow the instructions [url=https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A]here[/url] and choose the 'animgraph_2_beta' build. Note that you will not be able to connect to Valve servers while you are using the beta build. To report bugs or provide feedback about Animgraph 2, please email csgoteamfeedback@valvesoftware.com with the subject "AG2 Beta".
newsitems.contents_en:
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/3b774ae067b0a4fb8b71d41fdde8d073ac5a064c.png[/img]

Today we're shipping a beta build that updates CS2's animation system to Animgraph 2, which reduces the CPU and networking costs associated with animation. Along with the technical work involved in switching to the new system, all third person animations have been re-authored and, in many cases, adjusted in response to player feedback.

It's time for you to take a look, poke around for bugs, and tell us what you think. To opt into the beta build, follow the instructions [url=https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A]here[/url] and choose the 'animgraph_2_beta' build. Note that you will not be able to connect to Valve servers while you are using the beta build. To report bugs or provide feedback about Animgraph 2, please email csgoteamfeedback@valvesoftware.com with the subject "AG2 Beta".
newsitems.contents_cn:
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/3b774ae067b0a4fb8b71d41fdde8d073ac5a064c.png[/img]

今天，我们发布了一个测试版本，将 CS2 的动画系统更新为 Animgraph 2，从而降低了与动画相关的 CPU 和网络成本。除了切换到新系统所涉及的技术工作外，所有第三人称动画都已重新创作，并且在许多情况下根据玩家的反馈进行了调整。

现在是时候让您看看、查找错误并告诉我们您的想法了。要选择 Beta 版本，请按照 [url=https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/5A86-0DF4-C59E-8C4A]此处[/url] 的说明进行操作，然后选择“animgraph_2_beta”版本。请注意，当您使用测试版时，您将无法连接到 Valve 服务器。要报告错误或提供有关 Animgraph 2 的反馈，请发送电子邮件至 csgoteamfeedback@valvesoftware.com，主题为“AG2 Beta”。

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 gets a major update with reload changes, custom game modes
newsitems.contents:
Possibly one of the most controversial updates for the Counter-Strike series as a whole, the latest Counter-Strike 2 update brings major changes from Valve.

Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/03/counter-strike-2-gets-a-major-update-with-reload-changes-custom-game-modes/
newsitems.title_en: Counter-Strike 2 gets a major update with reload changes, custom game modes
newsitems.contents_en:
Possibly one of the most controversial updates for the Counter-Strike series as a whole, the latest Counter-Strike 2 update brings major changes from Valve.

Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/03/counter-strike-2-gets-a-major-update-with-reload-changes-custom-game-modes/
newsitems.title_cn: Counter-Strike 2 获得重大更新，包括重新加载更改、自定义游戏模式
newsitems.contents_cn:
最新的《反恐精英 2》更新可能是整个《反恐精英》系列中最具争议的更新之一，它带来了 Valve 的重大更改。

在此处阅读完整文章： https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/03/counter-strike-2-gets-a-major-update-with-reload-changes-custom-game-modes/

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: COMPLEX
newsitems.contents:
[ GAMEPLAY ][list]
[*]Reloading has been refactored to encourage more careful consideration of the use of ammo. When you reload a magazine-fed weapon, all remaining ammo in the magazine is discarded and a new, full magazine is taken from the reserves.
[*]Reserve ammunition is now represented either as number of magazines, shells, or bullets, depending on the weapon.
[*]The fill-level of the current weapon is now displayed below the ammo count. 
[*]Tuned reserve magazine counts per-weapon.[/list]
[ MAP GUIDES ][list]
[*]Limited map guides are now available in Competitive and Retakes (first 5 rounds of the half, 30 node max).
[*]sv_allow_annotations_access_level supports 3 values: 0 – disabled. 1 – limited view. 2 – full and editable. 
[*]sv_annotation_limits_max_rounds_per_half (default 5) determines how many rounds into the half guides are allowed. -1 for unlimited.
[*]Minimal starter map guides have been added for all Active Duty maps.[/list]
[ WORKSHOP MAPS ]
[list]
[*]Friends playing a Practice or Workshop map can be joined through the friends menu if they have Open Party set.[/list]
newsitems.contents_en:
[ GAMEPLAY ][list]
[*]Reloading has been refactored to encourage more careful consideration of the use of ammo. When you reload a magazine-fed weapon, all remaining ammo in the magazine is discarded and a new, full magazine is taken from the reserves.
[*]Reserve ammunition is now represented either as number of magazines, shells, or bullets, depending on the weapon.
[*]The fill-level of the current weapon is now displayed below the ammo count. 
[*]Tuned reserve magazine counts per-weapon.[/list]
[ MAP GUIDES ][list]
[*]Limited map guides are now available in Competitive and Retakes (first 5 rounds of the half, 30 node max).
[*]sv_allow_annotations_access_level supports 3 values: 0 – disabled. 1 – limited view. 2 – full and editable. 
[*]sv_annotation_limits_max_rounds_per_half (default 5) determines how many rounds into the half guides are allowed. -1 for unlimited.
[*]Minimal starter map guides have been added for all Active Duty maps.[/list]
[ WORKSHOP MAPS ]
[list]
[*]Friends playing a Practice or Workshop map can be joined through the friends menu if they have Open Party set.[/list]
newsitems.contents_cn:
[ 游戏玩法 ][ 列表 ]
[*]重装已被重构，以鼓励更仔细地考虑弹药的使用。当您重新装载弹匣供弹的武器时，弹匣中所有剩余的弹药都会被丢弃，并从储备中取出一个新的、装满的弹匣。
[*]储备弹药现在以弹匣、炮弹或子弹的数量表示，具体取决于武器。
[*]当前武器的填充水平现在显示在弹药数下方。 
[*]调整了每种武器的储备弹匣数量。[/list]
[ 地图指南 ][ 列表 ]
[*]现在在竞技赛和重考赛中提供有限的地图指南（半场前 5 轮，最多 30 个节点）。
[*]sv_allow_annotations_access_level 支持 3 个值：0 – 禁用。 1 – 视野有限。 2 – 完整且可编辑。 
[*]sv_annotation_limits_max_rounds_per_half（默认为 5）决定允许多少轮进入半指南。 -1 表示无限制。
[*]已为所有现役地图添加了最小入门地图指南。[/list]
[ 车间地图 ]
[列表]
[*]玩练习或创意工坊地图的朋友如果设置了开放派对，可以通过朋友菜单加入。[/list]

newsitems.title: Guns, Guides, and Games
newsitems.author: Piggles ULTRAPRO
newsitems.contents:
[p]From reloading to custom games, today's update will give you plenty to think about.
[/p][h3]Reload[/h3][p][img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5dd914dd4a8901aa52b0075f683a6d0e3538d55b.png[/img]
When you reload in CS2, the leftover ammo in your magazine is dumped back into an essentially endless reserve supply. And so the decision to reload has never offered significant trade-offs—in a safe position with enough time, you might reload after firing a single bullet, or half a mag, or after firing down to empty, and the rest of the round would be unaffected. 

We think the decision to reload should have higher stakes, so in today's update reloading has been redesigned. Now, when you reload, you'll drop the used magazine and discard all of its remaining ammo. Instead of 'topping off' your weapon with a few bullets, a new full magazine will be taken from the reserves whenever you reload. 

How many reserve mags will each weapon have? Most have gotten a three clips fill-up, but some weapons will have less to reward efficiency and precision, or more to encourage spamming through walls and smokes. Keep an eye on your reserve supply!

[/p][h3]Map Guides in Competitive Matches[/h3][p]
We get it. You [i]could[/i] learn some smokes offline, but who has the time? 

To help you pick up some new tricks, map guides can now be used during the first five rounds of the half in your competitive matches. Competitive map guides are more limited than the ones you use offline, but should be enough to give you a few reminders.

You can activate a guide in the pause menu, and to get you started there are official map guides available for Active Duty maps. But if you're looking for something more specific, you can subscribe to guides on the Steam Community Workshop.

[/p][h3]Join Friends in Custom Games[/h3][p][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/12cbcda636bfce8e15f9df254d0725feb0261abe.png[/img]
Over the past several months, the CS community has been hard at work building custom game modes using special scripting tools. Now, you can join your friends in the fun!

Whenever you're playing a custom game, whether on a community server or hosted locally, your friends will be able to join you directly from the Friends list (as long as the server allows it). 

Want to set up your own custom game? Head over to your Workshop Maps tab in the Play menu, and make sure to turn on "Open Party." Now, when you start playing your workshop map you'll host a game on your machine, and your friends will be able to join.

So head to the Steam Community Workshop, subscribe to some maps, and try something new![/p]
newsitems.contents_en:
[p]From reloading to custom games, today's update will give you plenty to think about.
[/p][h3]Reload[/h3][p][img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5dd914dd4a8901aa52b0075f683a6d0e3538d55b.png[/img]
When you reload in CS2, the leftover ammo in your magazine is dumped back into an essentially endless reserve supply. And so the decision to reload has never offered significant trade-offs—in a safe position with enough time, you might reload after firing a single bullet, or half a mag, or after firing down to empty, and the rest of the round would be unaffected. 

We think the decision to reload should have higher stakes, so in today's update reloading has been redesigned. Now, when you reload, you'll drop the used magazine and discard all of its remaining ammo. Instead of 'topping off' your weapon with a few bullets, a new full magazine will be taken from the reserves whenever you reload. 

How many reserve mags will each weapon have? Most have gotten a three clips fill-up, but some weapons will have less to reward efficiency and precision, or more to encourage spamming through walls and smokes. Keep an eye on your reserve supply!

[/p][h3]Map Guides in Competitive Matches[/h3][p]
We get it. You [i]could[/i] learn some smokes offline, but who has the time? 

To help you pick up some new tricks, map guides can now be used during the first five rounds of the half in your competitive matches. Competitive map guides are more limited than the ones you use offline, but should be enough to give you a few reminders.

You can activate a guide in the pause menu, and to get you started there are official map guides available for Active Duty maps. But if you're looking for something more specific, you can subscribe to guides on the Steam Community Workshop.

[/p][h3]Join Friends in Custom Games[/h3][p][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/12cbcda636bfce8e15f9df254d0725feb0261abe.png[/img]
Over the past several months, the CS community has been hard at work building custom game modes using special scripting tools. Now, you can join your friends in the fun!

Whenever you're playing a custom game, whether on a community server or hosted locally, your friends will be able to join you directly from the Friends list (as long as the server allows it). 

Want to set up your own custom game? Head over to your Workshop Maps tab in the Play menu, and make sure to turn on "Open Party." Now, when you start playing your workshop map you'll host a game on your machine, and your friends will be able to join.

So head to the Steam Community Workshop, subscribe to some maps, and try something new![/p]
newsitems.contents_cn:
[p]从重新加载到自定义游戏，今天的更新将给你带来很多思考。
[/p][h3]重新加载[/h3][p][img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5dd914dd4a8901aa52b0075f683a6d0e3538d55b.png[/img]
当你在 CS2 中重新装弹时，弹匣中剩余的弹药会被转回本质上无穷无尽的储备供应中。因此，重新装弹的决定从来没有带来重大的权衡——在一个安全的位置，有足够的时间，你可能会在发射一颗子弹或半弹匣后重新装弹，或者在射击到空后重新装弹，而该轮的其余部分将不受影响。 

我们认为重新加载的决定应该具有更高的风险，因此在今天的更新中重新设计了重新加载。现在，当您重新装弹时，您将丢弃用过的弹匣并丢弃所有剩余的弹药。每当您重新装弹时，都会从储备中取出一个新的完整弹匣，而不是用几颗子弹“补充”您的武器。 

每件武器有多少备用弹匣？大多数武器都配备了三个弹夹，但有些武器的弹夹填充量较少，以奖励效率和精确度，或者更多，以鼓励穿过墙壁和烟雾进行垃圾邮件。请留意您的储备供应！

[/p][h3]竞技比赛中的地图指南[/h3][p]
我们明白了。你[i]可以[/i]离线学习一些抽烟的知识，但是谁有时间呢？ 

为了帮助您掌握一些新技巧，现在可以在竞技比赛的前五轮比赛中使用地图指南。竞争性地图指南比您离线使用的地图指南更有限，但应该足以给您一些提醒。

您可以在暂停菜单中激活指南，为了帮助您入门，有适用于现役地图的官方地图指南。但如果您正在寻找更具体的内容，您可以订阅 Steam 社区研讨会上的指南。

[/p][h3]在自定义游戏中加入好友[/h3][p][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/12cbcda636bfce8e15f9df254d0725feb0261abe.png[/img]
在过去的几个月里，CS 社区一直在努力使用特殊的脚本工具构建自定义游戏模式。现在，你可以和你的朋友一起享受乐趣了！

每当您玩自定义游戏时，无论是在社区服务器上还是在本地托管，您的朋友都可以直接从好友列表中加入您（只要服务器允许）。 

想要设置您自己的自定义游戏吗？前往“播放”菜单中的“创意工坊地图”选项卡，并确保打开“开放派对”。现在，当您开始玩工坊地图时，您将在您的计算机上托管游戏，并且您的朋友将能够加入。

因此，前往 Steam 社区创意工坊，订阅一些地图，并尝试新的东西！[/p]
